message:
Fix bugs, compilation errors, and test failures across the codebase

- Fix double mutable borrow in lab reactor
- Fix missing Debug impl for IoDriver
- Fix TcpSocket import and set_keepalive in net module
- Fix E0369 (Duration + Time) in recovery strategy
- Fix borrow checker error in security context
- Fix duplicate fill_bytes in det_rng
- Fix string escaping in observability tests
- Fix backoff test to account for deterministic jitter
- Add missing files (net, error/recovery, reactor, io_driver, sync/rwlock)
